notes: All character portrait images use this fixed vertical canvas.
Compose with safe margins for object-fit cover in the web reader.
Target style is photorealistic fantasy novel illustration, not anime.
spec.globalPrompt: Photorealistic fantasy novel insert art, cinematic natural light, realistic skin texture, high detail fabric, high detail hair, believable proportions, clean background separation, vertical full-body or 3/4 portrait, centered composition with headroom and footroom, premium live-action look.
spec.globalNegativePrompt: anime, manga, cel shading, chibi, cartoon, deformed anatomy, extra limbs, extra fingers, low detail face, flat lighting, text, logo, watermark, frame, collage, duplicated ears, duplicated tail, blurry eyes

selectionPolicy.assumption: This list covers named and image-worthy characters first. Unnamed villagers, guards, bandits, and one-scene background roles are intentionally excluded.

characters.name: サトー
characters.sourceSummary: A slightly long-haired man with a mature, quietly handsome look. In the text he first appears in a simple linen shirt, but for the canonical visual design we want a cooler, world-fitting fantasy outfit with more presence while keeping him grounded. His signature beard moves with magic and can extend like a living high-grade brush.
characters.prompt: Create a photorealistic portrait of Sato, a Japanese man in his late 30s to early 40s, calm and grounded, slightly long dark hair, refined rugged features, intelligent tired eyes, and a well-kept dark beard that subtly floats with magical life. Dress him in a stylish fantasy-world outfit that feels practical but clearly more striking than a plain shirt: layered dark earth-tone tunic, fitted vest or coat, subtle leather details, tasteful belts or shoulder elements, and the aura of a quiet hero who became important without trying. The outfit should feel cool, mature, and visually memorable within a rustic fantasy world, without becoming flashy armor or noble courtwear. Expression should feel gentle, dry-humored, and dependable rather than arrogant. Add a faint supernatural presence around the beard, as if individual beard strands respond to his will. Background: warm rustic inn room or soft fantasy village light. Real-person fantasy illustration, serious novel insert art.
characters.negativePrompt: comedic beard tentacles, exaggerated superhero pose, teenage face, modern business clothes, plain peasant shirt only, gaudy king costume, heavy full plate armor

characters.name: ニャル子
characters.sourceSummary: A cheerful cat-eared maid girl with silver hair, a large tail, and a lovable expression. The novel explicitly says amber eyes, a black-and-white maid outfit, and a bell worn at her chest. Later she bears the blue teardrop mark of the second key directly below that bell.
characters.referencePolicy: Use the user-provided reference image as the primary design source for face shape, hair length, cat ears, tail volume, and overall silhouette. Do not copy the pink costume colors from the reference. Keep the result photorealistic instead of anime.
characters.prompt: Create a photorealistic full-body portrait of Nyaruko, a cat-eared maid heroine, based primarily on the supplied reference image but translated into realistic live-action fantasy style. She is petite and bright, with soft silver bob hair, expressive cat ears, a fluffy pale tail, and a lovable mischievous smile. Her eyes should be warm amber, matching the novel text. Keep the facial impression, ear shape, tail volume, youthful silhouette, and friendly charm from the reference image, but change the outfit to match the novel: a black-and-white maid dress for a fantasy village inn, elegant but practical, with a modest neckline, white apron, believable fabric, and a skirt length around the knees. The overall look should read as a real working maid in a warm inn, not stage costume or idol costume. A small but clearly visible bell must be attached at the upper chest or collar area as part of her signature design. Add the later-story blue teardrop emblem or jewel-like mark directly below the bell, so both the bell and the blue mark are visible together. Preserve ribbon and lace balance only if it still reads as a believable black-and-white maid uniform. Mood should be warm, lively, loyal, and slightly playful. Absolutely not anime; realistic human proportions and facial structure.
characters.negativePrompt: anime face, doll joints, cosplay photography feel, fetish framing, overly sexualized maid pose, exposed upper thighs, ultra short skirt, lingerie styling, pin-up pose, missing bell, hidden bell, necklace only without bell

characters.name: セレスティア・ルーンベルク
characters.sourceSummary: A woman in her late twenties, silver-gray long hair tied back, sharp icy eyes, wearing a dark navy cloak over elegant light armor. She carries both a rapier and a short wand, giving a knight-mage impression.
characters.prompt: Create a photorealistic character portrait of Celestia Runebelk, a late-20s female royal investigator. She has silver-gray long hair tied back, cold sharp eyes, disciplined posture, and the aura of an elite field officer. Outfit: dark navy cloak, refined light armor, slim rapier at the waist, short wand on the back or in hand. She should look like a hybrid of knight and mage: precise, competent, restrained, dangerous. Expression should be cool and watchful, with only a trace of buried concern. Background: dim village interior or wind-swept road to the capital. Realistic fantasy intelligence officer, not glamorous idol styling.
characters.negativePrompt: smiling idol pose, ornate princess dress, oversized armor, cartoon magic effects

characters.name: イゼル・ヴァン＝オルディア
characters.role: upper leadership of the royal special bureau
characters.sourceSummary: A woman in her mid-thirties, long black hair tied back, wearing white-silver elite armor with a royal emblem. She has a thin metallic assistive device over one eye and projects command authority.
characters.prompt: Create a photorealistic portrait of Izel van Ordia, a mid-30s woman from the upper command of the royal special investigation bureau. She has long black hair tied back neatly, a composed severe face, and one eye fitted with a slim metallic assistive monocle-like device. Outfit: white-silver light command armor with a refined royal insignia, practical but unmistakably high rank. She should feel brilliant, politically dangerous, efficient, and hard to intimidate. Pose should be upright and controlled, with a commander’s gaze rather than a warrior’s aggression. Keep styling elegant but functional.
characters.negativePrompt: cyberpunk neon, sci-fi exosuit, soft cute demeanor, exposed fashion armor

characters.name: レギウス
characters.sourceSummary: A man in a black cloak with a half mask covering one side of his face. The exposed side wears a relaxed, intelligent smile. Under the mask are old burn-like scars from the eye area to the cheek and neck. He later carries a black short staff and purple wedges.
characters.prompt: Create a photorealistic portrait of Legius, an enigmatic male mediator from a third faction. He wears a black cloak and a half mask covering one side of the face. The visible side of his mouth shows a calm, ironic smile. Under the removed mask version, reveal old burn-like scars running from the eye area down the cheek and neck. He carries a black short staff and several elegant violet wedge-shaped tools or relic spikes. He should feel intelligent, morally ambiguous, tired, and strangely trustworthy. Lighting should emphasize the contrast between concealment and honesty.
characters.negativePrompt: full helmet, clown mask, flamboyant villain grin, gothic vampire styling

characters.name: マグダレナ
characters.role: keeper of the Gray Bell convent
characters.sourceSummary: An elderly one-eyed nun who stands with a staff, wearing gray monastic robes. She gives the impression of age, grief, memory, and stone-like endurance.
characters.prompt: Create a photorealistic portrait of Magdalena, an elderly one-eyed nun and keeper of the Gray Bell convent. She stands with a worn staff, wrapped in heavy gray monastic robes. Her visible eye is sharp despite age; her face is lined, severe, and deeply compassionate under the hardness. She should feel like someone who has guarded forbidden memories for decades. Setting: dim stone convent courtyard with mist and old bells. Tone: austere, sacred, tired, and unyielding.
characters.negativePrompt: evil witch cliché, horror zombie face, glamorous young nun, bright cheerful palette

characters.name: 村長
characters.sourceSummary: A small elderly man with a white beard, usually carrying a cane and hat, earnest and kind but easily flustered when danger strikes.
characters.prompt: Create a photorealistic portrait of the village chief, a small elderly man with a full white beard, weathered hands, a country hat, and a wooden cane. He should look sincere, anxious, and warm-hearted, like a rural leader trying his best to protect a tiny frontier village. Outfit: simple fantasy village elder clothing in muted browns and off-whites. Background: village square in morning light.
characters.negativePrompt: comic caricature, royal noble costume, exaggerated dwarf fantasy styling

characters.name: ジョアン・ベルクラフト
characters.sourceSummary: An older predecessor in the beard lineage, appearing as a recorded figure. He smiles with tiredness and carries the weight of sealed coordinates and long vigilance.
characters.prompt: Create a photorealistic spectral portrait of Joan Bellcraft, a historical predecessor in the beard lineage. He should resemble a distant ancestor of Sato: mature male features, a dignified beard-centered design, and a weary but gentle smile. Present him as an archival record or ghostly projection, with pale desaturated light and old memory textures around him. He should feel noble, burdened, and quietly apologetic across time.
characters.negativePrompt: transparent halloween ghost, skeleton, glowing fantasy overload, old wizard cliché hat

characters.name: 最終確認者
characters.role: symbolic final examiner of the succession line
characters.sourceSummary: A long-robed figure with an obscured face, ancient and ambiguous, like the role of the responder itself taking human shape. The voice is neither clearly male nor female.
characters.prompt: Create a photorealistic mysterious portrait of the Final Confirmer, an androgynous ancient figure in long layered robes. The face is not fully visible, but the silhouette feels faintly familiar to Sato. The presence should seem older than any individual person, as if a role or system has taken human form. Keep the face partly veiled by light, shadow, or angle. Mood: solemn, quiet, exhausted, impartial, timeless. Background: blue-lit circular chamber before the final gate.
characters.negativePrompt: grim reaper, monster face, heavy horror, bright superhero aura

characters.name: しろたま
characters.sourceSummary: A tiny fluffy companion creature that should read primarily as a soft round fur ball, not as a normal cat. The novel emphasizes that it looks like a complete fluffy puffball, with round black eyes, ear tips tinted pale gray, and a slightly rounder shape by the end.
characters.prompt: Create a photorealistic companion portrait of Shirotama, a tiny fluffy fantasy familiar shaped like a living white ball of fur. The body must read first as a nearly perfect soft sphere, not as a normal cat body. Hide the legs and paws completely inside the fur so no feet are visible. Bury the ears deep inside the fluff so only small rounded ear hints are visible near the top, with the faintest pale-gray tint at the tips. The main readable features should be huge round black eyes, a tiny mouth area, and a small soft tail emerging from the fluff. The silhouette should feel like a fluffy pom-pom or fur orb with eyes and a tail, adorable and slightly mysterious. Keep the design extremely soft, huggable, and readable. Add a faint magical bond atmosphere, but keep it grounded and believable rather than mascot-cartoony.
characters.negativePrompt: normal cat body, kitten proportions, visible legs, visible paws, realistic housecat posture, large pointed ears, long snout, plush toy product shot, mascot suit, giant monster rabbit, cartoon kawaii simplification
